request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The recent attacks in European cities prove we need stronger domestic security powers. Critics claim this threatens civil liberties, but in reality, these measures are carefully balanced to protect us all. We can't afford to wait until another tragedy happens - our security agencies need these tools NOW. #NationalSecurityFirst
